title: Insufficient Data Masking/Redaction
description: Sensitive data is not adequately masked or redacted in logs, error messages, or database queries. This exposes confidential information to unauthorized individuals.
affected_component: Logging System, Database Queries, Error Handling
attack_vector: Accessing logs or database queries that contain sensitive data. An attacker could gain insight into the system's internal workings or steal confidential information.
mitigations: Implement data masking and redaction techniques.
Restrict access to sensitive data based on the principle of least privilege.
Regularly review and update data masking policies.
